poc: KV cache math feasibility + cluster capacity

math_analysis.attempt: K_B1 + K_B2 where both share prefix
math_analysis.problem_1_position_encoding: RoPE makes K_i a function of position, K_B1[i] + K_B2[i] has no physical meaning
math_analysis.problem_3_multi_head_inconsistency: Different heads have different attention patterns across batches
math_analysis.verdict: KV tensors CANNOT be summed linearly. Industry uses prefix matching + selective recomputation (CacheBlend 15% re-derivation), not summation

verdict: H4 (KV 叠加) 数学不可行, 应该走 prefix matching + KVQuant 压缩
